name: taskmaster-suite
description: Meta-bundle: the full clarification-to-execution workflow plus its wired companions — taskmaster, task-runner, stack-scan, code-architecture, the stack-agnostic review/process toolkit, and the ui-ux agents the pipeline's visual cards route to. Uninstall cleanly with /taskmaster-suite:uninstall — removes the bundle and prunes its auto-installed plugins.
